title: Assume user 0 group 0, if /etc/passwd file in container.
body:
While attempting to run buildah in a container without an /etc/passwd, it is
blowing up.  This change will cause buildah to assume that it is running as
root.

Signed-off-by: Daniel J Walsh <dwalsh@redhat.com>

comments.body: LGTM but would like a head nod from @giuseppe
Looks like Travis CI is having problems finding/installing seccomp, going to rekick the tests.

:pushpin: Commit 0685851 has been approved by `umohnani8`
